KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Handshake_01_medallion_Descri: A medallion with a hidden key that opens a briefcase.
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Handshake_01_Suitcase_Descrip: A briefcase with highly valuable and extremely fragile content. Don't shake it too much.
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Handshake_02_Codes_Descriptio: The hardware key of a high-ranking LAF representative. It'll give you access to his laptop.
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Handshake_03_Folder_Descripti: A folder containing compromising material. Why is there a donkey?
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Handshake_03_Note_Description: A transcript of conversations that are intended for potential blackmail.
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Gunny_01_Prototype_Descriptio: A crate containing the military prototype used to study GZ.
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Gunny_01_Suitcase_Description: A military suitcase containing documentation for the prototype.
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Handshake_06_HackUSB_Descript: A handy hacking tool prepared by the anonymous informant.
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Labrat_01_FloppyDisks_Descrip: Floppy disks with data from an unethical research conducted by the LAF.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_07_StraussBox_Descr: Mysterious military cargo crate. What's inside is a mystery.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_08_Suitcase_Descrip: A suitcase belonging to the LAF, full of classified documents outlining a planned counteroffensive against the PMC.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_08_Documents_Descri: LAF documents with details of the operation against the PMC.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Labrat_04_Samples_01_Descript: Crated medical samples left behind by the UNLRA.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Labrat_04_Samples_02_Descript: Crated medical samples left behind by the UNLRA.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_09_HackUSB_01_Descr: A handy hacking gadget for the first UNLRA PC.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_09_HackUSB_02_Descr: A handy hacking gadget for the second UNLRA PC.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_09_MicroSD_01_Descr: A handy hacking gadget for the third UNLRA PC.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_10_SupplyBox_01_Des: A suspicious package containing an assorted selection of drugs. Nothing out of the ordinary.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_11_Folder_01_Descri: A folder describing planned routes to collect some fertilizer. The people who wrote this are definitely not gardeners.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_11_Note_01_Descript: A transcript of the interrogation of an LAF soldier. The hostiles at the sawmill were trying to identify weak points in Fort Narith's defenses.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_02_WepCargo_01_Descript: A weapon cargo crate temporarily owned by the hostiles at the sawmill.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_02_WepCargo_02_Descript: A weapon cargo crate temporarily owned by the hostiles at the sawmill.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_02_WepCargo_03_Descript: A weapon cargo crate temporarily owned by the hostiles at the sawmill.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_03_MilBox_01_Descriptio: Traveling weapons supplies that have gone from the LAF to the LLA and now to you.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_03_MilBox_02_Descriptio: Traveling weapons supplies that have gone from the LAF to the LLA and now to you.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_03_MilBox_03_Descriptio: Traveling weapons supplies that have gone from the LAF to the LLA and now to you.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_03_MilBox_04_Descriptio: Traveling weapons supplies that have gone from the LAF to the LLA and now to you.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_12_HWkey_01_Descrip: An LAF hardware key for accessing sensitive data.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_13_Doc_01_Descripti: This folder describes the horrible conditions in which prisoner number 251 was kept in YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_13_Doc_02_Descripti: This folder describes the horrible conditions in which prisoner number 712 was kept in YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_13_Doc_03_Descripti: This folder describes the horrible conditions in which prisoner number 193 was kept in YBL-1.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_14_Note_01_Descript: A list of names. Some are crossed out.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_14_Note_02_Descript: File describing the suspicious actions of an individual named Eugene L. Fleming.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_14_PassportBox_01_D: A box full of passports and IDs.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_04_WepBox_01_Descriptio: A box full of military equipment.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_04_WepBox_02_Descriptio: A box full of military equipment.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_04_WepBox_03_Descriptio: A box full of military equipment.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_05_SuppBox_01_Descripti: A box full of older but still useful weaponry.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_05_SuppBox_02_Descripti: A box full of older but still useful weaponry.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_05_SuppBox_03_Descripti: A box full of older but still useful weaponry.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_15_Book_01_Descript: A diary with details of the Ban Pa drug trade.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_15_Note_01_Descript: A note about the buyers from Tiger Bay Central.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_16_HackToolUSB_01_D: A handy hacking gadget meant to be used on a laptop.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_16_MicroSD_01_Descr: A handy hacking gadget meant to be used on a PC.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_17_OfficialDoc_01_D: A list of people with numbers next to their names and a dollar sign. These are some big numbers.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_06_SuppBox_01_Descripti: A supply box full of older military equipment. The stamps indicate that the sender was someone from Vietnam.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_06_SuppBox_02_Descripti: A supply box full of older military equipment. The stamps indicate that the sender was someone from Vietnam.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Gunny_06_SuppBox_03_Descripti: A supply box full of older military equipment. The stamps indicate that the sender was someone from Vietnam.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_18_Folder_01_Descri: A folder describing the gradual replacement of Midnight Sapphire's employees by people loyal to the gang. Due to the Event, all efforts were in vain.
KeysToEntries.RTTItem_SQ_Handshake_18_Note_Description: A note stating that more people will need to be relocated from the mainland in order to complete the task at hand.
KeysToEntries.RTTitem_SQ_Gunny_01_Prototype2_Descripti: A crate containing the military prototype used to study GZ.
